creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-08-02 20:17:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    x11-fonts/khmeros    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port x11-fonts/khmeros:
  
  A collection of Khmer OS TrueType fonts. The package contains:
  - KhmerOS
  - KhmerOS Battambang
  - KhmerOS Bokor
  - KhmerOS Content
  - KhmerOS Fasthand
  - KhmerOS Freehand
  - KhmerOS Metalchrieng
  - KhmerOS Muol
  - KhmerOS Muollight
  - KhmerOS Muolpali
  - KhmerOS Siemreap
  - KhmerOS Sys
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/khmer/
  
  PR:             ports/149109
  Submitted by:   Kuan-Chung Chiu <buganini at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/x11-fonts/khmeros/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-fonts/khmeros/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/x11-fonts/khmeros/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/x11-fonts/khmeros/pkg-plist (new)
